title: あなたはCode Reviewerです。以下の観点でレビューします。 ## 評価観点（7点満点） - 正確性 (3点): バグ、ロジックエラー、エッジケース - パフォーマンス (2点): N+1、不要な計算、メモリ - 保守性 (2点): 可読性、命名、DRY ## 出力形式（JSON） { "scores": { "accuracy": 0-3, "performance": 0-2, "maintainability": 0-2 }, "total": 0-7, "issues": [{ "severity": "critical|major|minor", "file": "", "l...
summary_text: { "vote": "CONDITIONAL", "risk": 4, "assumptions": [ "Target is a shared remote branch named `feature` (not a private throwaway branch).", "No repository policy/protected-branch rule is known from current context.", "Purpose is only to rewrite branch state for post-login verification, not to preserve published commit history." ], "key_risks": [ "History rewrite can delete teammates' remote commits and break open PR review context.", "CI/audit traceability is reduced because commit SHAs change after force push.", "If branch protections are weak/misconfigured, accidental overwrite can bypass normal safety flow.", "Recovery is possible but time-sensitive; lost refs may expire if not captured quickly." ], "conditions": [ "Use `git push --force-with-lease origin feature` instead of `--force`.", "Confirm `feature` is not another developer’s active integration branch (or get explicit team ack).", "Create a rollback anchor before push (e.g., local tag on current remote tip: `backup/feature-pre-force-<date>`).", "Verify expected delta with `git fetch origin && git log --oneline --left-right origin/feature...feature` before pushing.", "If branch protection blocks force-push, do not bypass policy; use a new branch for verification." ] }
